title: astragalus biovulatus
intro: Astragalus biovulatus, also known as the biovulatus milkvetch or milk vetch, is a type of perennial plant in the legume family that is native to the mountainous regions of western North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and immune-boosting effects. The health benefits associated with Astragalus biovulatus include improved immune function, reduced inflammation, and enhanced cardiovascular health. Astragalus biovulatus is often prepared as a decoction or tea, and can also be found in supplement form, as well as in the form of capsules or tablets.
